block_00: Crude Oil Bearish Trend Keeps Gaining Traction
block_02: The past few weeks showed a tremendous downtrend in crude oil prices. While some calculated losses and prayed for the trend reversal, others went short, thus making a profit on the current market situation.
block_03: If we take a look at the commodity market, we can see that in recent days crude oil experienced the greatest fall in price by almost 59%. А particularly telling example is the May contract for US WTI crude oil that reached zero threshold for the first time in history before going further below settling at almost –$40 per barrel.
block_04: Today's market situation is one of a kind. Never in history has the commodity market been so volatile, and oil companies have never been so close to bankruptcy as they are today.
block_05: However, if looking at the current situation from the point of view of a professional trader, it becomes pretty obvious that these days are probably the most favorable in terms of making a profit out of the market volatility.
